titleStmt.title: SII 34.405: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 405. Aruppukkōṭṭai, Aruppukkottai Taluk, Ramanathapuram District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Sundarēśvara temple.

summary.p: The trustees of the temple assigned some temple land to a maṭhapati of the temple of Kuṟaḷmāṇīśvaram-udāiyār at Iḍattuvaḷi in Cheṅgāṭṭirukkai for making two flower-gardens for the use of the temple.
[Published in Virudhunagar District Inscriptions, No. 134/2005, lines 1-14.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ruḷiyacuntarapāṇ
kkaṣattut tiraiyōtaciyun peṟṟa Urōcaṇinā
ḷ Iṭattuva ṭaiyār kuṟaḻ
māṇiccaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār kōyiṟ taṇṭēccuraṉēṉ Iṉṉāyaṉṉār
tirumaṭaiviḷākattu maṭapatikaḷil Ālampākamuṭaiyāṉ perumā
ṉ Utaiyaṉāṉa catācivatēvaṉukku taṇṭēccura piramāṇam
paṇṇikkuṭutta nilamāvatu Iṉṉāyaṉār maṉakuḷattu Ivaṉukkārāḻ
mai ceytu kuṭutta nilattukkuc cūḻellaikkuk kīḻellai cīkā
riyap pēṟṟukku mēṟkum teṉṉellai ciṟumaṇkuḷattukarai
kku vaṭakkum mēllellai nampāṇṭāṉ ceykkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellaima
ṇ pōkattukku teṟku muṭpaṭṭataṭi pala nilam Orumāvuṅ kārā
ḻmai Ākappaṇṇikkuṭuttōm Iṉṉilaṅ kaikkoṇṭu I
nṉāyaṉārkku Iraṇṭu tirunantavāṉa ceytu tiruppaḷittāma
ñ ceytu Oṭukku
vārāka Iṉṉi
lam Iṟaiyyi
li Uṇṭu tiruppa
ḷittāmam Oṭukku
vārākap piramāṇa
m paṇṇikkuṭu
tēṉ taṇṭēca
nnēṉ Innantavaṉa
m Iraṇṭilum ce
yta payir Oḻiya
onṟu kaṟiyamutu
kku kuṭupparākavu
m Ippaṭi cammatittu ka
ḷai copparaṇam paṇ
ṇi vilaik kuṟṟa viṟṟu po
ruḷḷaṟak koṇṭu kalli
lē veṭṭikkuṭuttō
m Ikkōyil patipātapaṭ
ṭuṭai paiñcācāriyarō
m catācivatēvanukku I
varkaḷ collavum A
ruḷicceyaṟpaṭikkum It
tirumalaiyil kalveṭ
napirān peri
yānnāna Aḻakiya
tēva Ācāriya
nēn Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.405 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
